chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 491 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.1971/2022 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 26-10-2022 None present for the petitioner. On the last date of hearing i.e. 27-09-2022, Counsel for the petitioner was put on notice to satisfy the Court as to maintainability of the instant petition, as through this petition the petitioner, who was appointed as Helper in Sukkur Municipal Corporation on “temporary basis”, seeks directions for the restoration of his services along with his current as well as previous salary w.e.f. 29-09-2021. The petitioner, as being employed temporary for the alleged post, has no legal right for continuing his position; hence, instant petition is dismissed being not maintainable in law along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
